channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Senior Counsel Advises Ruto to Avoid Mt Kenya Running Mate After UDA's By-Election Loss
item.description: Senior Counsel Ahmednasir Abdullahi has urged President William Ruto to abandon plans for a Mt Kenya running mate following the United Democratic Alliance (UDA)'s defeat in the Ol Kalou by-election. T...

item.title: Pretty Woman the Musical: A Nostalgic Take with Mixed Results
item.description: The review of *Pretty Woman: The Musical* highlights its reliance on nostalgia for the iconic 1990 film, while critiquing its adaptation challenges. The musical, set in a world of conspicuous consumpt...

item.title: Emmerdale actor Bradley Riches shares details of theft during Heartstopper premiere incident
item.description: Bradley Riches, a cast member of the British soap opera Emmerdale, has disclosed that he experienced a robbery while attending the premiere of the popular coming-of-age series Heartstopper. The incide...

item.title: Coca-Cola Halts Fairlife Dairy Production After Ransomware Attack
item.description: Coca-Cola, a global beverage giant, has temporarily suspended production at its Fairlife dairy subsidiary following a ransomware attack that disrupted its operations. The company disclosed the inciden...

item.title: Venezuelan Coastal Town Remains Unscathed After Earthquake
item.description: A coastal town in Venezuela, referred to as 'blessed,' has miraculously avoided significant damage from a recent earthquake. The incident occurred on July 17, 2026, and highlights the region's vulnera...

item.title: Two Wildlife-Related Deaths Under Investigation Near La Ronge, Saskatchewan
item.description: Two deaths at McTavish Lake, located north of La Ronge in Saskatchewan, are suspected to be wildlife-related, according to the Saskatchewan government. Conservation officers and the RCMP are investiga...

item.title: Cape Town's Good Hope Centre sale sparks political controversy over transparency and housing
item.description: The sale of Cape Town's Good Hope Centre has become a flashpoint in local politics, with the GOOD Party accusing Mayor Geordin Hill-Lewis of mishandling the multimillion-rand transaction. The controve...

item.title: Mark Carney Justifies New Pipeline Amid Climate Concerns and Wildfire Challenges
item.description: Prime Minister Mark Carney has defended his government's decision to proceed with a new oil pipeline project despite growing scrutiny over Canada's climate commitments and ongoing wildfires in norther...

item.title: APIs: Bridging AI and Business Processes Through Secure Communication
item.description: This article explores how Application Programming Interfaces (APIs) act as the critical link between artificial intelligence (AI) and real-world business operations. APIs are sets of rules that enable...

item.title: Ben Shapiro Criticizes JD Vance for Embracing Democratic Policies

item.title: ABS-CBN Introduces CPR as Word of the Day for July 17, 2026
item.description: The article announces CPR as the Word of the Day for July 17, 2026, highlighting ABS-CBN's commitment to public service and Filipino values. It emphasizes the company's role as a leading media and ent...

item.title: Tragedy Strikes Uganda School Bus: 20 Students and One Adult Killed in Kapchorwa Crash
item.description: A school bus carrying pupils from King David Junior School crashed while returning from an educational tour in Kapchorwa District, Uganda, killing 20 children and one adult. The incident occurred on J...

item.title: Whittlesea Council Lists Liquidations for July 16
item.description: The article details a list of liquidations announced by Whittlesea Council for July 16. It highlights the process of identifying businesses facing financial difficulties and the implications for local...

item.title: Matty Healy Hosts Stag Do With The 1975 Tribute Band Ahead of Engagement to Gabbriette
item.description: Matty Healy, frontman of The 1975, recently celebrated his upcoming wedding to model and musician Gabbriette by hosting a stag do in Malibu. During the event, he performed with a tribute band recreati...

item.title: Arizona GOP Candidate Faces Primary Challenge Over Sexual Scandals and Trump Endorsement
item.description: Mark Lamb, a Republican candidate for Arizona's House of Representatives, is facing a contentious primary challenge due to allegations of sexual misconduct. His opponent, Daniel Keenan, has spent mill...

item.title: Bill Gates Explores Renewable Energy Potential in Pilbara for Data Centers
item.description: The article discusses Bill Gates' recent visit to the Pilbara region in Western Australia, where he assessed the area's renewable energy infrastructure as a potential solution for Australia's data cen...

item.title: Midwestern Republicans Criticize Canada's Forest Management Amid Wildfire Smoke Concerns

item.title: Spain Expands Visa-Free Access to 8 African Countries for Short Stays
item.description: Spain has updated its visa-free travel policy, allowing citizens of eight African countries to visit the nation for up to 90 days without needing a visa. The newly included nations are Rwanda, Mauriti...

item.title: Trump's baseless election fraud claims and legislative push for voter restrictions
item.description: Former President Donald Trump has continued to make unsubstantiated allegations about widespread election fraud in the 2020 presidential election, claiming that 'burn bags' containing destroyed inform...

item.title: 14 members of the Ugly Americans gang charged with serious crimes in Cape Town
